title: Factory Bot Cheat Sheet
description: Quick reference for Factory Bot usage in Ruby on Rails.

commands.description: Define a basic factory for a User model
commands.scenario: Define a basic factory for a User model

commands.command:
FactoryBot.define do
  factory :user do
    sequence(:email) { |n| "user#{n}@example.com" }
  end
end
commands.description: Define a sequence for unique email addresses
commands.scenario: Define a sequence for unique email addresses

commands.command:
FactoryBot.define do
  factory :user do
    name { "John Doe" }

    trait :admin do
      admin { true }
    end
  end
end

commands.description: Create a user instance in a test
commands.scenario: Create a user instance in a test

commands.description: Build a user instance without saving to the database
commands.scenario: Build a user instance without saving to the database

commands.description: Create a list of user instances
commands.scenario: Create a list of user instances

commands.command:
FactoryBot.define do
  factory :post do
    title { "Sample Post" }
    association :user
  end
end

FactoryBot.define do
  factory :user do
    transient do
      upcased false
    end

    after(:create) do |user, evaluator|
      user.name.upcase! if evaluator.upcased
    end
  end
end
commands.description: Use transient attributes in a factory
commands.scenario: Use transient attributes in a factory
